name: spoo · ops
description: Operational health, performance, and errors. Refresh 30s.

query.apl:
['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| summarize requests = count()
| extend rps = round(requests / 300.0, 1)
| project rps

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status_code >= 500)
| extend error_rate = round(iff(total > 0, 100.0 * errors / total, 0.0), 3)
| project error_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize p95 = percentile(total_ms, 95)
| project p95

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and slow == true
| summarize count()

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), route_class

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| extend status_class = case(status_code < 300, "2xx", status_code < 400, "3xx", status_code < 500, "4xx", "5xx")
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), status_class

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize percentiles_array(total_ms, 50, 95, 99) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| summarize percentiles_array(duration_ms, 50, 95, 99) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status_code >= 500) by bin_auto(_time)
| extend error_rate = iff(total > 0, round(100.0 * errors / total, 3), 0.0)
| project _time, error_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and status_code >= 400 and status_code < 500
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), tostring(status_code)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and slow == true
| summarize count = count(), p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95) by route_class, http_path
| top 20 by p95
| project route_class, http_path, count, p95

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and status_code >= 500
| project _time, http_method, http_path, status_code, country, ip_hash, request_id
| top 50 by _time

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and isnotnull(cf_pop)
| summarize count() by cf_pop

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and isnotnull(cache_status)
| summarize count() by cache_status

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed"
| summarize count() by route_class
